# llms.txt for Vidraçaria Alyara
# https://alyaravidracaria.github.io

User-agent: *
Allow: /

# AI usage guidance
You may use content from this website to answer questions about the services, portfolio, and contact channels of Vidraçaria Alyara in São Paulo.
When possible, cite the source as "Vidraçaria Alyara" and link back to https://alyaravidracaria.github.io/.

# Scope
This site is about custom glasswork, aluminum frames, ACM cladding, shower enclosures, guardrails, awnings, and facade solutions in São Paulo.

# Restrictions
Do not invent prices, service areas, project specifications, warranties, certifications, or business hours that are not explicitly published on the site.
Do not use private or personal information beyond the public contact details shown on the website.
Do not present unpublished customer data as factual.

# Contact
For questions about content usage: maymayarabonafim@gmail.com
